  "findings": [
    "Failure to isolate and dissipate stored energy (hydraulic pressure, gravity, or capacitor charge) during lockout/tagout."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all work in progress on the affected equipment.",
    "Relieve, disconnect, restrain, or otherwise render safe all stored or residual energy sources.",
    "Apply physical blocks, pins, or blanks to prevent movement from gravity or hydraulic pressure.",
    "Verify zero energy state before resuming any work."
  ],
  "rationale": "The failure to isolate stored energy (such as hydraulic pressure, gravity, or electrical capacitors) poses an immediate, life-threatening hazard to workers. Under OSHA 1910.147, all potentially hazardous stored or residual energy must be relieved, disconnected, restrained, and otherwise rendered safe.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(5)(i)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(6)"
  ]
}
